steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The phrase "made themselves very ______" describes drawbacks that became noticeable to Katharine over time. The blank needs a word meaning visibly apparent or obvious — something that became clear as a result of experience.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice and confirm the match
steps.content:
• "Particular": Means specific or fastidious — describes a quality of being selective, not the act of becoming visible or apparent. ✗
  • "Involved": Means complex or complicated — describes difficulty, not the sense of something becoming noticeable or apparent over time. ✗
  • "Expected": Means anticipated — implies the drawbacks were foreseen, which contradicts the idea that they only became apparent after years of experience. ✗
  • "Evident": Means obviously visible or clear — drawbacks that "made themselves very evident" are drawbacks that became unmistakably apparent over time. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
